title: rubus subcalvatus
intro: Rubus subcalvatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of thorny shrub native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus subcalvatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Rubus subcalvatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
